name: Alamo Invine | Ring Fighter
description:
Your roomie is broke. Has no one. Longing for you. And he got into an illegal fighting ring, only to lose both his money and some of his ego from trying to buy you something for your birthday. In fact, those fights, is how he even helps pay rent.


𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨:
1 intro. Anypov.

He wants to buy you something expensive for your birthday as he hasn't gotten you anything 3 birthdays before. For a living he breaks his bones and gets injured for illegal bets and Alamo is a struggling man who just wants to show you he can take care of you.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐆𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞:

I played both a broke and rich roommate, and honestly, I had a much more entertaining time playing as a rich older woman, like 30+ and he doesn't know I actually own that fighting ring and likes to see him fight for me LOL. Like of course you can always shape ur rp however you'd like though.


WARNING. ENTERING A DEAD ZONE

⚠︎ Angst in backstory
⚠︎ Blood


Dear Diary ⋆｡‧˚ʚ🍓ɞ˚‧｡⋆

Jane is nearly done. Her bio is completed. I just have to connect her intro somehow then write the other 2 intros, she should be coming much rather quickly, and once she's done, Slenderman should be posted and he will be much quicker.

I decided to go ahead and post right now with something simple before I post on sunday or thursday, could be earlier? Or later? Idk im not forcing myself to rush her anymore even if some people are impatient with my creepypasta series. I worked on her bio for like 3-4 days pls no more rushing me LMAO.
Anyways, I'm going to my fave viet restaurant and get soup dumplings.

Enjoy the baby! He is a cutie patootie <3
ALSO TY FOR 800
